resources.string: AEGIS uses Accessibility Service to detect scam messages, phishing attempts, and security threats in real-time across all apps. No personal data is stored or uploaded without your consent.
AEGIS monitors notifications to detect scam messages and phishing attempts in SMS and messaging apps.
AEGIS VPN Service blocks malicious domains, phishing sites, and known scam servers to protect your connection.
AEGIS is running in the background to keep you protected from scams and security threats.
